overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses a waterfront promenade, ascends stairs, passes through a covered underpass with blue lighting, and emerges onto a busy city street with traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with palm trees and skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement alongside a large concrete building with palm trees to the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego on the promenade

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with red accent lighting running along the top edge
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
dense cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers with neon windows forming the city skyline
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night, with a massive concrete building on the left and palm trees lining the right side. The distant skyline features towering illuminated skyscrapers, while the wet pavement reflects the ambient neon lighting. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to upper pedestrian level

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete stairs alongside the building

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to reach the upper level walkway

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket sitting on the stairs to the left

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings ascending between building walls

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by the building wall on the left and open air on the right. A person in yellow sits on the steps to the left. The palm trees recede into the distance as the character climbs toward the upper promenade level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters upper promenade with neon-lit shops

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade passing by pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: bright yellow and blue modern benches lined along the right side railing
storefront with vibrant pink neon lighting and signage on the left side

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks along a broader promenade lined with yellow benches on the right and a neon-pink lit shop on the left. More pedestrians populate this area, and the palm trees are visible again closer to the right side. The rain continues to fall on the wet concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with blue neon ceiling lighting

events.description: enters covered underpass with blue neon ceiling lights and concrete walls
exits underpass into area with red ambient lighting from street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage transitioning from blue-lit interior to the street

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure creating a covered tunnel effect with rough textured walls
continuous strip of bright cyan-blue neon lights running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered concrete underpass illuminated by striking blue neon ceiling lights. The enclosed space provides shelter from the rain. As the character progresses, the lighting shifts to red tones as the street exit approaches, revealing traffic barriers and vehicles ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with traffic lights and moving vehicles

events.description: emerges from underpass onto city sidewalk with vehicle traffic and street lights
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk alongside other pedestrians with traffic moving on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red and green lights and street signs attached
street sign reading 'Brookland' suspended over the intersection
multiple cars and taxis driving on the multi-lane street with red taillights
orange traffic barriers with reflective stripes separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass onto a bustling city street with moderate traffic. Orange barriers line the left side separating the sidewalk from vehicles. A traffic light pole and 'Brookland' street sign are prominent on the left. The traffic light changes from red to green as cars begin to move, and pedestrians walk alongside the character on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked waterfront promenade into the heart of a bustling, neon-lit city street. It begins by trailing the character past palm trees and a massive concrete building, where the wet pavement reflects a distant skyline of illuminated skyscrapers. As the character ascends a wide concrete staircase, the view shifts toward an upper promenade lined with yellow benches and a neon-pink shop before the path leads into a covered concrete underpass. The environment then transitions from striking blue ceiling lights to red tones as the character moves through the shelter, eventually emerging from the tunnel. Finally, the scene opens onto a busy street featuring orange barriers and a Brookland sign, where the traffic light turns green and cars begin to move alongside pedestrians on the damp pavement.
